name: Code Owners
description: Define code owners for the repository
body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        # Code Owners for Choretwo

        This file defines who owns different parts of the codebase for review purposes.
        The CODEOWNERS file in the root directory is the primary source of truth.

        ## Review Workflow

        - Code owners are automatically requested as reviewers when files they own are changed
        - Approval from code owners may be required based on branch protection rules
        - Being listed here does not mean you must approve every PR, but you should review if you have expertise

        ## Contact

        For questions about code ownership, please reach out to the project maintainers.
